MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES.
RULING: THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE LAW FIRM OF INGBER & ASSOCAITES' MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS TOTAL FAMILY SUPPORT CLINIC AND DR. OLGA SKARLATO IS Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.

Ntc Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kenneth S. Ingber, Esq., of Ingber & Associates, Tel. 310.788.3811, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Thomas S. Wrobel, Esq., of T.S. Wrobel & Associates, Tel. 415.9284161, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS TOTAL FAMILY SUPPORT CLINIC AND DR. OLGA SKARLATO'S Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment is Granted. Paragraph 10 of Ms. Skarlato's declaration presents a meritorious defense, defendants exercised diligence in bringing this motion, and defendants provide a satisfactory excuse for not responding to the termination motion. The request for sanctions is denied without prejudice to seeking full attorney's fees for the whole time that there was no response from defendants in a Motion For Attorney's Fees at the conclusion of the case. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Thomas Wrobel, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) Bruce Graham,
Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Total Family Support Clinic, et al for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $86,737.46
Prejudgment Interest - $4,911.75
Attorney's Fees - $37,781.25
Costs - $1,234.00
Court Sanctions $3,112.00
Total judgment in the amount of $133,785.96

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
